name: Neat

aliases.name: Boundary
aliases.comment:
A bounded View without gap.

Convert to/from View by `setGap`/`setBoundary`.

aliases.name: IsGap
aliases.comment:
Information about your custom gaps.

  - horizontal : horizontal gap relative to _base size_
  - vertical : vertical gap relative to _base size_

e.g., If the _base size_ is `2rem`, `IsGap { horizontal = 1.2, vertical = 2 }` becomes gap with `"2.4rem"` horizontally and `"4rem"` vertically.

values.name: defaultRenderer
values.comment: - base size: 1rem

values.name: render
values.comment: Render the `View` into `Html` so that it spreads across the screen.

values.name: setBaseSizeInRem
values.comment:
Set the base size in [rem](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/length#rem).

> Represents the font-size of the root element (typically <html>).

All gap sizes are determined relative to this value.

values.name: unless
values.comment: Apply a modifier unless a condition is met.

values.name: when
values.comment: Apply a modifier only when a condition is met.

values.name: withMaybe
values.comment: Apply a modifier only if the given value is `Just`.
values.type: Maybe.Maybe a -> (a -> b -> b) -> b -> b

name: Neat.Boundary

aliases.name: Boundary
aliases.comment:
A bounded View without gap.

Convert to/from View by `setGap`/`setBoundary`.

aliases.name: Layer
aliases.comment:
Set the position of each edge of the overlay layer as a percentage of the base view.

The `priority` field specifies how much the element is superimposed on the front side in preference to other elements. If given `Nothing`, it is set equivalent priority comparing to other elements.
aliases.type: { top : Basics.Float, bottom : Basics.Float, left : Basics.Float, right : Basics.Float, priority : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Int }

values.name: bottomItem
values.comment: Bottom-aligned item.

values.name: center
values.comment: An alias for `row` with a centered element.

values.name: centerItem
values.comment: Horizontally centered item.

values.name: column
values.comment: Align children horizontally.

values.name: columnItem
values.comment: Column item with stretched height.

values.name: defaultColumn
values.comment:
Default setting for columns.

  - vertical alignment: top
  - vertical scroll: disabled

values.name: defaultLayer
values.comment:
defaultLayer
    --> { top = 0
    --> , bottom = 0
    --> , left = 0
    --> , right = 0
    --> , priority = Nothing
    --> }

values.name: defaultRow
values.comment:
Default setting for rows.

  - horizontal alignment: left
  - wrapping: enabled
  - horizontal scroll: disabled

values.name: empty
values.comment:
An empty block.

In HTML terms, it generates an HTML element without content.

    -- Exposed by `elm-community/html-extra`


    import Html.Attributes exposing (type_, value)
    import Html.Events.Extra exposing (onChange)
    import Neat.Boundary as Boundary

    input : Model -> Boundary msg
    input model =
        Boundary.empty
            |> Boundary.setNodeName "input"
            |> Boundary.setAttributes
                [ type_ "text"
                , value model.input
                , onChange ChangeInputValue
                ]

values.name: enableVScroll
values.comment: Enable vertical scroll.

values.name: grownBottomItem
values.comment: Bottom-aligned item which grows its width as much as possible.

values.name: grownCenterItem
values.comment: Horizontally centered item which grows its width as much as possible.

values.name: grownColumnItem
values.comment: Column item with stretched height and width.

values.name: grownLeftItem
values.comment: Left-aligned item which grows its width as much as possible.

values.name: grownMiddleItem
values.comment: Vertically centered item which grows its width as much as possible.

values.name: grownRightItem
values.comment: Right-aligned item which grows its width as much as possible.

values.name: grownRowItem
values.comment: Row item with stretched height and width.

values.name: grownTopItem
values.comment: Top-aligned item which grows its width as much as possible.

values.name: leftItem
values.comment: Left-aligned item.

values.name: middleItem
values.comment: Vertically centered item.

values.name: none
values.comment:
Generates no HTML nodes.
This is useful for handling elements which only appears under certain conditions.

    when p v =
        if p then
            v

        else
            none

values.name: putLayer
values.comment: Put overlay layer on the parent view.
values.type: String.String -> ( Neat.Boundary.Layer, Neat.Boundary.Boundary (Neat.Boundary.Layered msg) ) -> Neat.Boundary.Boundary msg -> Neat.Boundary.Boundary msg

values.name: rightItem
values.comment: Right-aligned item.

values.name: row
values.comment: Align children horizontally.

values.name: rowItem
values.comment: Row item with stretched height.

values.name: setAria
values.comment:
Set "aria-\*" value for WAI-ARIA.

e.g., `setAria "required" "true"` stands for "aria-required" is "true".
values.type: String.String -> String.String -> Neat.Boundary.Boundary msg -> Neat.Boundary.Boundary msg

values.name: setAttribute
values.comment: Append `Attribute` on boundaries.
values.type: Html.Attribute msg -> Neat.Boundary.Boundary msg -> Neat.Boundary.Boundary msg

values.name: setAttributes
values.comment: Same as `setAttribute` but takes a list of `Attribute`s.
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Neat.Boundary.Boundary msg -> Neat.Boundary.Boundary msg

values.name: setBoolAria
values.comment:
Set boolean "aria-\*" value for WAI-ARIA.

i.e.,

  - `setBoolAria name True` is equal to `setAria name "true"`
  - `setBoolAria name False` is equal to `setAria name "false"`
values.type: String.String -> Basics.Bool -> Neat.Boundary.Boundary msg -> Neat.Boundary.Boundary msg

values.name: setClass
values.comment: Append `class` attribute.

values.name: setGap
values.comment: Set Gap around a view.
values.type: Neat.Internal.IsGap gap -> Neat.Boundary.Boundary msg -> Neat.Internal.View gap msg

values.name: setId
values.comment: Append `id` attribute.

values.name: setMaxHeightInBs
values.comment:
Set the maximum height as a percentage of the _base size_.
e.g., `setMaxHeightInBs 100` set the _maximum height_ the same length as the _base size_.

values.name: setMaxHeightInEm
values.comment:
Set the maximum height in [em](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/length#em).

> Represents the calculated font-size of the element.

values.name: setMaxHeightInRem
values.comment:
Set the maximum height in [rem](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/length#rem).

> Represents the font-size of the root element (typically <html>).

values.name: setMaxWidthInBs
values.comment:
Set the maximum width as a percentage of the _base size_.
e.g., `setMaxWidthInBs 100` set the _maximum width_ the same length as the _base size_.

values.name: setMaxWidthInEm
values.comment:
Set the maximum width in [em](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/length#em).

> Represents the calculated font-size of the element.

values.name: setMaxWidthInRem
values.comment:
Set the maximum width in [rem](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/length#rem).

> Represents the font-size of the root element (typically <html>).

values.name: setMinHeightInBs
values.comment:
Set the minimum height as a percentage of the _base size_.
e.g., `setMinHeightInBs 100` set the _minimum height_ the same length as the _base size_.

values.name: setMinHeightInEm
values.comment:
Set the minimum height in [em](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/length#em).

> Represents the calculated font-size of the element.

values.name: setMinHeightInRem
values.comment:
Set the minimum height in [rem](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/length#rem).

> Represents the font-size of the root element (typically <html>).

values.name: setMinWidthInBs
values.comment:
Set the minimum width as a percentage of the _base size_.
e.g., `setMinWidthInBs 100` set the _minimum width_ the same length as the _base size_.

values.name: setMinWidthInEm
values.comment:
Set the minimum width in [em](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/length#em).

> Represents the calculated font-size of the element.

values.name: setMinWidthInRem
values.comment:
Set the minimum width in [rem](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/length#rem).

> Represents the font-size of the root element (typically <html>).

values.name: setMixin
values.comment: Append `Mixin` on boundaries.
values.type: Mixin.Mixin msg -> Neat.Boundary.Boundary msg -> Neat.Boundary.Boundary msg

values.name: setMixins
values.comment: Same as `setMixin` but takes a list of `Mixin`s.
values.type: List.List (Mixin.Mixin msg) -> Neat.Boundary.Boundary msg -> Neat.Boundary.Boundary msg

values.name: setNodeName
values.comment: Set HTML node name on `Boundary`.

values.name: setRole
values.comment: Set "role" value for WAI-ARIA.

values.name: setVerticalScroller
values.comment:
Just for convenience.

    setVerticalScroller boundary =
        column
            (defaultColumn
                |> enableVScroll
            )
            [ grownColumnItem "content" boundary
            ]

values.name: toLayered
values.comment: Convert `Boundary` for `putLayer`. The `Boundary (Layered msg)` ignores pointer events; this feature is especially helpfull for realizing popups with clickable background.

values.name: topItem
values.comment: Top-aligned item.

values.name: unless
values.comment: Insert a view unless a condition is met.

values.name: when
values.comment: Insert a view only when a condition is met.

values.name: withMaybe
values.comment: Insert a view only if the given value is `Just`.
values.type: Maybe.Maybe a -> (a -> Neat.Boundary.Boundary msg) -> Neat.Boundary.Boundary msg

name: Neat.Flow

values.name: fromString
values.comment: Generate a `Flow` with given text content.

values.name: none
values.comment:
Generate Nothing.
It can be used to realize `Flow`s only displayed under certain conditions, as shown below.

    fromFlows
        [ case mtext of
            Just t ->
                text t

            Nothing ->
                none
        ]

In most cases, however, a function like `when` will suffice.

values.name: setAria
values.comment:
Set "aria-\*" value for WAI-ARIA.

e.g., `setAria "required" "true"` stands for "aria-required" is "true".
values.type: String.String -> String.String -> Neat.Flow.Flow msg -> Neat.Flow.Flow msg

values.name: setAttribute
values.type: Html.Attribute msg -> Neat.Flow.Flow msg -> Neat.Flow.Flow msg

values.name: setAttributes
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Neat.Flow.Flow msg -> Neat.Flow.Flow msg

values.name: setBoolAria
values.comment:
Set boolean "aria-\*" value for WAI-ARIA.

i.e.,

  - `setBoolAria name True` is equal to `setAria name "true"`
  - `setBoolAria name False` is equal to `setAria name "false"`
values.type: String.String -> Basics.Bool -> Neat.Flow.Flow msg -> Neat.Flow.Flow msg

values.name: setClass
values.comment: Append `class` attribute.

values.name: setId
values.comment: Append `id` attribute.

values.name: setMixin
values.type: Mixin.Mixin msg -> Neat.Flow.Flow msg -> Neat.Flow.Flow msg

values.name: setMixins
values.type: List.List (Mixin.Mixin msg) -> Neat.Flow.Flow msg -> Neat.Flow.Flow msg

values.name: setRole

values.type: Maybe.Maybe a -> (a -> Neat.Flow.Flow msg) -> Neat.Flow.Flow msg

name: Neat.View

values.name: bottomItem
values.comment: Bottom-aligned item.
values.type: String.String -> Neat.View.View gap msg -> Neat.View.RowItem gap msg

values.name: center
values.comment: An alias for `row` with a centered element.
values.type: Neat.View.View gap msg -> Neat.View.View gap msg

values.name: centerItem
values.comment: Horizontally centered item.
values.type: String.String -> Neat.View.View gap msg -> Neat.View.ColumnItem gap msg

values.name: column
values.comment: Align children vertically.
values.type: Neat.View.Column -> List.List (Neat.View.ColumnItem gap msg) -> Neat.View.View gap msg

values.name: columnItem
values.comment: Column item with stretched width.
values.type: String.String -> Neat.View.View gap msg -> Neat.View.ColumnItem gap msg

values.name: defaultColumn
values.comment:
Default setting for columns.

  - HTML node name: `"div"`
  - vertical alignment: top

values.name: defaultFlows
values.comment: Default setting for displaying flow contents.

values.name: defaultRow
values.comment:
Default setting for rows.

  - HTML node name: `"div"`
  - horizontal alignment: left
  - wrapping: enabled
  - role: no role
  - ARIA attributes: no attributes

values.name: disableTextWrap
values.comment: Disable the text content to be wrapped.

values.name: enableEllipsis
values.comment:
Display ellipsis (`…`, `U+2026 HORIZONTAL ELLIPSIS`) to represent clipped text when the flow content overflows.

This also disables the text content to be wrapped.

values.name: expandGap
values.comment:
Expand View Gap to a wider one.

You can use `expandGap` to "shrink" Gaps, but we do not recommend doing so. Such layouts must not be "neat"!
values.type: Neat.Internal.IsGap g2 -> Neat.View.View g1 msg -> Neat.View.View g2 msg

values.name: flows
values.comment:
Generates a view that displays flow contents.

Unlike a `row` consist of `textBlock`s, the `fromFlows` generates a single coherent sentence.

Say you have the following code:

    row
        defaultRow
        [ textBlock myLineHeight
            "foo bar baz"
        , textBlock myLineHeight
            "a b c d e f"
        ]

The resulting View will be newlined as follows:

    | foo bar | a b c d |
    | baz     | e f     |

In contrast, the View generated by the following code behaves a bit differently:

    import Neat.Flow as Flow

    fromFlows
        [ Flow.text "foo bar baz"
        , Flow.text "a b c d e f"
        ]

The resulting View will be newlined as follows:

    | foo bar baz a b c |
    | d e f             |

Note that `fromFlows gap []` does not generate anything.
values.type: Neat.Internal.IsGap gap -> Neat.View.Flows -> List.List (Neat.Flow.Flow msg) -> Neat.View.View gap msg

values.name: grownBottomItem
values.comment: Bottom-aligned item which grows its width as much as possible.
values.type: String.String -> Neat.View.View gap msg -> Neat.View.RowItem gap msg

values.name: grownCenterItem
values.comment: Horizontally centered item which grows its height as much as possible.
values.type: String.String -> Neat.View.View gap msg -> Neat.View.ColumnItem gap msg

values.name: grownColumnItem
values.comment: Column item with stretched width and height.
values.type: String.String -> Neat.View.View gap msg -> Neat.View.ColumnItem gap msg

values.name: grownLeftItem
values.comment: Left-aligned item which grows its height as much as possible.
values.type: String.String -> Neat.View.View gap msg -> Neat.View.ColumnItem gap msg

values.name: grownMiddleItem
values.comment: Vertically centered item which grows its width as much as possible.
values.type: String.String -> Neat.View.View gap msg -> Neat.View.RowItem gap msg

values.name: grownRightItem
values.comment: Right-aligned item which grows its height as much as possible.
values.type: String.String -> Neat.View.View gap msg -> Neat.View.ColumnItem gap msg

values.name: grownRowItem
values.comment: Row item with stretched height and width.
values.type: String.String -> Neat.View.View gap msg -> Neat.View.RowItem gap msg

values.name: grownTopItem
values.comment: Top-aligned item which grows its width as much as possible.
values.type: String.String -> Neat.View.View gap msg -> Neat.View.RowItem gap msg

values.name: leftItem
values.comment: Left-aligned item.
values.type: String.String -> Neat.View.View gap msg -> Neat.View.ColumnItem gap msg

values.name: map
values.type: (a -> b) -> Neat.View.View gap a -> Neat.View.View gap b

values.name: middleItem
values.comment: Vertically centered item.
values.type: String.String -> Neat.View.View gap msg -> Neat.View.RowItem gap msg

values.name: none
values.comment:
Generates no HTML nodes.
This is useful for handling elements which only appears under certain conditions.

    when p v =
        if p then
            v

        else
            none

values.name: preserveWhiteSpace
values.comment: Disable [collapsing](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/white-space#collapsing_of_white_space) of spaces, tabs, and new lines.

values.name: pushCenter
values.comment: Push the flow content to the center.

values.name: pushEnd
values.comment:
Push the flow content to the end.
(Right if [direction](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/direction) is `ltr`, left if direction is `rtl`.)

values.name: rightItem
values.comment: Right-aligned item.
values.type: String.String -> Neat.View.View gap msg -> Neat.View.ColumnItem gap msg

values.name: row
values.comment: Align children horizontally.
values.type: Neat.View.Row -> List.List (Neat.View.RowItem gap msg) -> Neat.View.View gap msg

values.name: rowItem
values.comment: Row item with stretched height.
values.type: String.String -> Neat.View.View gap msg -> Neat.View.RowItem gap msg

values.name: setAria
values.comment:
Set the WAI-ARIA `aria-*` attribute value of the outermost HTML element.

For Views created with `Neat.Boundary.setGap`, append the attribute to the original Boundary.

e.g., `setAria "required" "true"` stands for "aria-required" is "true".
values.type: String.String -> String.String -> Neat.View.View gap msg -> Neat.View.View gap msg

values.name: setBoolAria
values.comment:
Helper function to set boolean WAI-ARIA `aria-*` attribute value of the outermost HTML element.

i.e.,

  - `setBoolAria name True` is equal to `setAria name "true"`
  - `setBoolAria name False` is equal to `setAria name "false"`
values.type: String.String -> Basics.Bool -> Neat.View.View gap msg -> Neat.View.View gap msg

values.name: setBoundary
values.comment:
Wrap a view with boundary.
This is the only way to reset view gaps.

values.name: setNodeName
values.comment:
Overrides the node name of the outermost HTML element.

For Views created with `Neat.Boundary.setGap`, overwrite the node name of the original Boundary:

    import Neat.Boundary as Boundary exposing (Boundary)
    import Neat.View as View exposing (View)

    sampleBoundary : Boundary msg
    sampleBoundary =
        Debug.todo "Sample"

    sampleView : View SampleGap msg
    sampleView =
        sampleBoundary
            |> Boundary.setGap sampleGap
            |> View.setNodeName "section"

    -- `sampleView2` is equivalent to `sampleView`.
    sampleView2 : View SampleGap msg
    sampleView2 =
        sampleBoundary
            |> Boundary.setNodeName "section"
            |> Boundary.setGap sampleGap
values.type: String.String -> Neat.View.View gap msg -> Neat.View.View gap msg

values.name: setRole
values.comment:
Set the WAI-ARIA `role` attribute value of the outermost HTML element.

For Views created with `Neat.Boundary.setGap`, append the attribute to the original Boundary.
values.type: String.String -> Neat.View.View gap msg -> Neat.View.View gap msg

values.name: textBlock
values.comment:
Generates a view that displays a text string.

The first argument specifies the line height, which is the size of the gap between text lines when the given text is wrapped.

It is an alias for `\str -> flows gap defaultFlows [ Neat.Flow.fromString str ]`.

Note that `textBlock gap ""` does not generate anything.
values.type: Neat.Internal.IsGap gap -> String.String -> Neat.View.View gap msg

values.name: topItem
values.comment: Top-aligned item.
values.type: String.String -> Neat.View.View gap msg -> Neat.View.RowItem gap msg

values.name: unless
values.comment: Insert a view unless a condition is met.
values.type: Basics.Bool -> Neat.View.View gap msg -> Neat.View.View gap msg

values.name: when
values.comment: Insert a view only when a condition is met.
values.type: Basics.Bool -> Neat.View.View gap msg -> Neat.View.View gap msg

values.name: withMaybe
values.comment: Insert a view only if the given value is `Just`.
values.type: Maybe.Maybe a -> (a -> Neat.View.View gap msg) -> Neat.View.View gap msg
